name: Sweet Prison
original_name: กรงน้ำผึ้ง
overview: Tiaoleng, a successful businessman in Phuket, was murdered. His grandson Chalumpol must find out the truth, meanwhile he starts to have feelings for Nampueng, who he met before but now she comes with a new status, his young step grandma.

trailers.title: กรงน้ำผึ้ง [Official Trailer]
